special_mechanics.name: Whip Swing
special_mechanics.description: Jim can use his worm body as a whip to grab hold of and swing from certain hooks in levels

special_mechanics.name: Whip Jump Assist
special_mechanics.description: Whip move allows the player to make computer-controlled characters (like Peter Puppy) jump over pits

special_mechanics.name: Underwater Traversal
special_mechanics.description: Underwater maze level with time limit and collision mechanics

special_mechanics.name: Rocket Flight
special_mechanics.description: Andy Asteroids racing sections where Jim rides a rocket through tube-like structures; third-person perspective shift

special_mechanics.name: Bungee Jumping
special_mechanics.description: Competitive bungee-jumping and fighting variation level

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Qualitative data only. Sources describe gameplay mechanics and level design but contain no quantitative physics parameters. Exact movement values, gravity coefficients, and sub-pixel system details are not documented in available sources.
